title: T-027 — finance_outbox_events + d365_finance_dlq schema (§6.4, §12.2, §11.6)
prompt:
# T-027 — finance_outbox_events + d365_finance_dlq schema

PRD: docs/prd/10-FINANCE-PRD.md §6.4 finance_outbox_events DDL (lines 411-429) + d365_finance_dlq DDL (lines 431-446); §12.2 event taxonomy; §11.6 V-FIN-INT-01..07; §5.2 BRCGS 7y retention.
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Create Drizzle migration + ORM entries for `finance_outbox_events` (reuses 08-PROD §12 pattern) and `d365_finance_dlq` per PRD §6.4 verbatim. Enforce UNIQUE on idempotency_key (V-FIN-INT-01) and partial unique on (org_id, aggregate_id, event_type) to support at-most-once-per-aggregate semantics where applicable.

## Implementation contract
1. Migration `packages/db/migrations/0061_finance_outbox.sql`:
   - `CREATE TYPE outbox_status_enum AS ENUM ('pending','dispatching','delivered','failed','consolidated')` IF NOT EXISTS.
   - `CREATE TABLE finance_outbox_events` per §6.4 lines 411-429: id BIGSERIAL PK, event_id UUID UNIQUE DEFAULT gen_random_uuid(), org_id, event_type TEXT CHECK IN ('finance.standard_cost.approved','finance.cost_per_kg.changed','finance.wo_cost.closed','finance.wo_cost.reversed','finance.daily_journal.ready','finance.inventory_adjustment'), aggregate_id UUID, payload JSONB, target_system TEXT CHECK IN ('internal','d365_f&o'), target_payload JSONB, status outbox_status_enum DEFAULT 'pending', attempt_count INTEGER DEFAULT 0, next_retry_at TIMESTAMPTZ, last_error TEXT, delivered_at TIMESTAMPTZ, idempotency_key TEXT UNIQUE NOT NULL, enqueued_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), retention_until DATE GENERATED ALWAYS AS (enqueued_at::date + INTERVAL '7 years') STORED.
   - V-FIN-INT-01: idempotency_key UNIQUE constraint + CHECK regex `^[0-9a-f]{8}-[0-9a-f]{4}-7[0-9a-f]{3}-[89ab][0-9a-f]{3}-[0-9a-f]{12}$` (UUID v7 format).
   - V-FIN-INT-03: CHECK (jsonb_array_length(target_payload->'lines') > 0 OR target_system != 'd365_f&o') — non-empty lines for D365 dispatch.
   - Indexes: `idx_outbox_pending ON finance_outbox_events (org_id, status, next_retry_at) WHERE status IN ('pending','failed')`; `idx_outbox_aggregate ON finance_outbox_events (org_id, aggregate_id, event_type, enqueued_at DESC)`.
   - Partitioning: monthly by enqueued_at (NFR §15.3).
   - RLS via `app.current_org_id()`.
   - `CREATE TABLE d365_finance_dlq` per §6.4 lines 431-446: id UUID PK, org_id, source_outbox_event_id BIGINT FK, event_type, payload JSONB, last_error TEXT, error_category CHECK IN ('transient','permanent','schema','d365_validation'), attempt_count INTEGER, moved_to_dlq_at TIMESTAMPTZ DEFAULT now(), resolved_at, resolved_by FK→users, resolution_notes, retention_until GENERATED.
   - RLS via `app.current_org_id()`.
2. Drizzle ORM entries + register in index.ts.

## Files
- packages/db/migrations/0061_finance_outbox.sql [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/finance-outbox-events.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/d365-finance-dlq.ts [create]
- packages/db/src/schema/index.ts [modify]
- packages/db/__tests__/finance-outbox-schema.test.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria (Given-When-Then)
- Given migration 0061 ran, when \d finance_outbox_events inspected, then idempotency_key has UNIQUE + UUID v7 CHECK regex. AND given INSERT with idempotency_key not matching UUID v7 regex, when run, then CHECK fails.
- Given two INSERTs with same idempotency_key, when second runs, then UNIQUE violation (V-FIN-INT-01). AND given INSERT with target_system='d365_f&o' and lines=[], when run, then CHECK fails (V-FIN-INT-03 no empty dispatch).
- Given finance_outbox_events partitioned by enqueued_at, when SELECT FROM pg_partitioned_table, then it is listed. AND given d365_finance_dlq error_category='unknown', when INSERT runs, then CHECK fails.
- Given pg_policies on both tables, when listed, then references app.current_org_id().
_(AC count consolidated from 7→4 by Fixer F13 2026-05-14 (no coverage lost))_

## Test strategy (RED first)
- RED: finance-outbox-schema.test.ts asserts UNIQUE idempotency_key + CHECK regex + non-empty lines + partitioning + RLS.
- Run `pnpm --filter db migrate && pnpm --filter db test finance-outbox-schema`.

## Risk red lines
- D365 integration is strictly export-only (R15 anti-corruption contract per `_foundation/contracts/`) — MUST NOT mutate `factory_release_state` or any other canonical Monopilot state.
- Do not skip the UUID v7 regex CHECK — V-FIN-INT-01 + R14 contract.
- Do not allow target_payload.lines=[] for d365_f&o dispatch (V-FIN-INT-03).
- Do not omit partitioning — outbox volume at Phase 2 (5000 WOs/day × 4 event types = 20k events/day).
- Do not weaken RLS / FORCE ROW LEVEL SECURITY.
- Do not couple to packages/outbox internals — finance_outbox_events is a parallel namespaced table per PRD §12.

pipeline_inputs.description: finance_outbox_events partitioned by enqueued_at with UUID v7 idempotency CHECK + d365_finance_dlq with error_category enum.
pipeline_inputs.details: Mirrors 08-PROD §12 stage 2 pattern. UUID v7 CHECK enforces R14 contract. CHECK on target_payload.lines!=[] enforces V-FIN-INT-03 before dispatch.
